title: Introduction to Illustrator
description:
This online course from LaSalle College Vancouver will introduce you to the basics   of     Adobe Illustrator software, which is used industry-wide in the creation of digital and print material  .    
 You will learn how to create, modify and prepare vector content, including logos, diagrams, icons and illustrations in order to satisfy client needs according to industry standards and for various use cases.   
 Upon completion , you will be able to produce computerized drawings corresponding to different aesthetic criteria and usage.    
 This course is for anyone looking to build their skills or switch towards a rewarding Graphic Design career.    
 LaSalle College's graduates have been recognized by the Association of Registered Graphic Designers (RGD), a testament to the excellence we bring to the field of graphic arts.
